description_long: This is a classic hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a solid metal head. The handle is made from light-colored wood, ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip and efficient swinging motion. The axe head is forged from steel, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end for striking. The blade edge is straight and sharp, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, ensuring stability during use. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a steel wedge-shaped blade, designed for chopping and striking tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the axe head and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle and the wedge-shaped blade edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat poll of the axe head and the ergonomic handle shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's curvature and the blade's sharp edge.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, smooth finish, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge and flat poll, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the wooden handle.
